arts.ttl: Match Preview: Dortmund Host Bochum in the Revierderby-lite
arts.sum: Dortmund’s eagerness to drop points early in the season and Bochum’s eagerness to challenge Dortmund at every opportunity make this a difficult match. Nicknamed ‘The Unrelgatables’ despite six relegations, Bochum have become somewhat of a thorn in Dortmund’s side since returning to the Bundesliga in the 2021/22 season.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund vs. Bochum: Can BVB bounce back in derby clash?
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund will look to bounce back from a heavy 5-1 defeat to Stuttgart when they face Bochum in Friday’s derby clash.
After the sales of Jude Bellingham and Erling Haaland the past couple of summers, Borussia Dortmund are looking for their next big superstar and Ruhr Nachrichten reports they are hopeful for two…

arts.ttl: Zeidler reveals Masovic is out for Dortmund, provides update on Miyoshi
arts.sum: Speaking at his Thursday pre-match presser, VfL Bochum trainer Peter Zeidler has confirmed that central defender Erhan Masovic be unavailable for Friday's league match-up against Dortmund. The 62-year-old gaffer also provided an injury update on Japanese attacker Koji Miyoshi, who has been struggling with muscular issues in his thigh.

arts.ttl: Will Borussia Dortmund start summer arrival against Bochum?
arts.sum: It’s fair to say that Maximilian Beier’s Borussia Dortmund career hasn’t got off to the greatest of starts. Starting just one of Die Schwarzgelben’s four Bundesliga games following his €28.5m…

arts.ttl: ‘The players have to meet expectations’ – Borussia Dortmund’s Nuri Şahin demands a reaction
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund were on the end of a humiliating 5-1 defeat in Stuttgart last weekend and ahead of Friday’s Bundesliga derby against Bochum, Nuri Şahin demands a reaction from his…

arts.ttl: Preview: Borussia Dortmund vs. VfL Bochum - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Friday's Bundesliga clash between Borussia Dortmund and VfL Bochum, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
